# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.
# Category: cloud_network_security

---
parameters:
  virtualNetworkName:
    type: string
  subnetsVnetSubnet1CIDRAddressRange:
    type: string
  subnetsVnetSubnet2CIDRAddressRange:
    type: string
  subnetsVnetSubnet3CIDRAddressRange:
    type: string
variables:
  # Create a unique suffix for the resources created by ARM. Using unique names for resources is good practice and helps avoid name collisions, but this example will be used on one subscription per demo.
  uniqueString: 'unique-string'
# Template definition here. You do not need to modify anything above, just below this line
resources: 
  - type:Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    name:'${{ parameters.virtualNetworkName }}${{ variables.uniqueString }}'
    location: 'West US 2'
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01 
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - '10.0.0.0/8'
      subnets: # https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/templates/microsoft.network/virtualNetworks?view=azureresources-preview#SubnetProperties
          - name:'${{ parameters.subnetsVnetSubnet1Name }}${{ variables.uniqueString }}'
            addressPrefix:'${{ parameters.subnetsVnetSubnet1CIDRAddressRange }}' # https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/templates/microsoft.network/virtualNetworks?view=azureresources-preview#IpGroup
          - name:'${{ parameters.subnetsVnetSubnet2Name }}${{ variables.uniqueString }}'
            addressPrefix:'${{ parameters.subnetsVnetSubnet2CIDRAddressRange }}' # https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/templates/microsoft.network/virtualNetworks?view=azureresources-preview#IpGroup
          - name:'${{ parameters.subnetsVnetSubnet3Name }}${{ variables.uniqueString }}'
            addressPrefix:'${{ parameters.subnetsVnetSubnet3CIDRAddressRange }}' # https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/templates/microsoft.network/virtualNetworks?view=azureresources-preview#IpGroup
